items.name: AI2026
items.description: An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.name: Algo-artha
items.description: Algo-artha is a comprehensive machine learning framework designed to bridge the gap between material science and economic forecasting. This project leverages advanced ensemble modeling to predict material properties, assess structural stability, and forecast commodity price fluctuations to facilitate data-driven inverse design.

items.name: w5-football-prediction
items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.name: Feature-Engineering-Framework-For-Traffic-Accident-Prediction-using-XAI
items.description: 🚦 Predict traffic accident severity using advanced machine learning and explainable AI, enhancing road safety with clear insights from comprehensive data analysis.

items.description: A framework for developing multi-scale arrays for use in scientific machine learning (SciML) simulations

items.description: A real-time machine learning framework utilizing SMOTE and XGBoost for server-side transactional fraud detection and interception in Mobile Financial Services.

items.description: Machine learning framework for physical education performance prediction using preprocessing, LDA, SVR, LW-SVR, and NCCL optimization.

items.name: gota-pp-ml-models-tournament
items.description: A benchmarking framework that puts three machine learning models in direct competition to predict irrigation needs from NASA POWER data. Each model is trained and evaluated under the same conditions, and only the best-performing model is selected and used for production inference.

items.name: fucking-awesome-machine-learning

items.name: AIP-G-1.0
items.description: The AIP-G 1.0 (Alzheimer’s disease, Inhibitor Predictor for GSK-3β, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting GSK-3β inhibitors for Alzheimer’s disease.

items.name: AIP-S-1.0
items.description: The AIP-S 1.0 (Alzheimer’s disease, Inhibitor Predictor for sEH, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting sEH inhibitors in Alzheimer’s disease.

items.description: Scalable distributed machine learning training framework with multi-GPU synchronization and gradient compression

items.description: Production-ready MLOps framework powered by Apache Airflow. Automates CI/CD for machine learning architectures, managing scheduled model retraining, data drift monitoring, and artifact versioning.

items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: AgML
items.description: AgML is a centralized framework for agricultural machine learning. AgML provides access to public agricultural datasets for common agricultural deep learning tasks, with standard benchmarks and pretrained models, as well the ability to generate synthetic data and annotations.

items.name: Beyond-the-Red-Flags-Real-Time-Financial-Distress-Forecasting-for-NSE-Listed-Firms-Code
items.description: Machine Learning and Survival Analysis framework for real-time financial distress prediction of NSE-listed firms using Revised Altman Z-Score, XGBoost, RFECV, SMOTE+ENN, and Cox Proportional Hazards Models.

items.description: Petanque Partners develops AI-based quantitative research infrastructure, machine-learning forecasting models, and risk frameworks for liquid markets.

items.description: Physics-Informed Artificial Intelligence Framework for Structural Failure Prediction in Rotating Disk Systems using Machine Learning and Classical Mechanics.

items.name: dubai-property-intelligence-engine
items.description: The Dubai Property Intelligence Engine is a machine learning framework for predicting residential property prices. Built with Random Forest & XGBoost (81% R²), it leverages Dubai Land Department data. It integrates SHAP for Explainable AI (XAI) and features a Streamlit dashboard for real-time market appraisals and mortgage forecasting.

items.name: CoinageClusterML
items.description: Machine Learning framework for predicting binding energies and magic numbers in Cu, Ag, and Au nanoclusters (N ≤ 55) using the Open Quantum Cluster Database (OQCD). Features 7 ensemble models, SHAP interpretability, and 9 geometric descriptors.

items.name: vietnamese-ai
items.description: Framework Học máy (Machine Learning) mã nguồn mở đầu tiên sở hữu 100% API thuần tiếng Việt. Tích hợp toàn diện NLP, AutoML, Neural Networks cùng công cụ CLI & Docker sẵn sàng cho Production. Giúp lập trình viên Việt tiếp cận AI dễ dàng hơn! 🇻🇳

items.name: GOAL
items.description: GOAL (General Open Atomistic Laboratory) is a Python framework for training machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) on atomistic systems.

items.name: tox21-toxicity-ML-classification
items.description: A Machine Learning Framework for Toxicity Prediction in the Tox21 Dataset using hybrid molecular representations.

items.name: non-linear-clustering-framework
items.description: A hybrid Machine Learning framework built in Google Colab that benchmarks K-Means and Hierarchical clustering limitations on geometric data and resolves non-linear errors using a TensorFlow/Keras ANN.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: bost-connes-potential-reconstruction
items.description: A computational framework simulating the Bost-Connes system and the Hilbert–Pólya conjecture using variational quantum algorithms (VQE/VQD) and symbolic regression machine learning.

items.name: ModelingToolkit.jl
items.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

items.description: AI-driven Decision Intelligence framework for optimizing Circular Supply Chains using Machine Learning, Operations Research, Reverse Logistics, and Sustainability Analytics.

items.name: DyanSys-EEG
items.description: DynaSys-EEG is an AI driven framework that models EEG signals as dynamic systems to analyze brain activity, detect patterns, and improve neurological research. It combines machine learning, signal processing, and LOSO evaluation for accurate scalable analysis.

items.name: Project
items.description: This project develops a machine learning based framework for automated Security Operations Centre alert triage. It uses Random Forest, XGBoost, and LSTM models to classify cybersecurity alerts, reduce false positives, prioritise threats, and support SOC analysts in managing alert fatigue. The framework is tested using public cybersecurity datasets

items.name: Hybrid-Diabetes-Prediction-Framework-Using-Autoencoders-and-Random-Forest
items.description: This project implements two machine learning pipelines for diabetes prediction using biomedical data: a baseline Random Forest model optimized with GridSearchCV and an enhanced Autoencoder + Random Forest approach for feature extraction and classification. The system is deployed using FastAPI, Docker, and AWS EC2.

Implements CausalForestDML and DRLearner with doubly robust validation, SHAP-based feature importance, and decision curve analysis using the RADCURE dataset.

items.name: Neural-Network-From-Scratch-Python
items.description: A custom neural network built from scratch using Python without external machine learning frameworks. Includes forward propagation, backpropagation, training logic, and basic AI concepts implementation.

items.name: fraud-detection-pipeline
items.description: An end-to-end cyber-security data engineering and machine learning framework designed to capture financial anomaly signatures. This multi-tiered software architecture leverages **MySQL** for high-frequency behavioral baseline window aggregations, fits an unsupervised **Isolation Forest** outlier matrix model.

items.name: ASD-Screening-ML-DL
items.description: An intelligent machine learning and deep learning framework for early detection of Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) using questionnaire-based screening data. The project combines Bagging, Boosting, and TabTransformer models with advanced preprocessing, resampling, and model evaluation techniques.

items.name: student-profile-identification-xai
items.description: An Explainable AI (XAI) framework for identifying student profiles in Online Judge systems using Machine Learning and Multi-Instance Learning techniques to predict student performance and provide interpretable feedback for students and instructors.

items.name: MetaMorph
items.description: MetaMorph is an open-source framework that leverages the power of Large Language Models (LLMs) to process, extract, and transform messy, unstructured, or heterogeneous columns of metadata into structured, machine-readable formats to enhance machine learning pipelines and predictive models across any domain.

items.name: PhosFate
items.description: PhosBind is a machine learning framework that leverages ESM2 protein embeddings to predict and classify anion-binding sites, with a focus on phosphate recognition. It enables data-driven insights into protein–anion interactions for applications in biomolecular design and nutrient recovery.

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks
